win_condition: Players win rounds by being last remaining or holding highest card at deck end; first to required favor tokens by player count wins the game.
tiebreaker: Round ties on highest revealed card give all tied players a favor token; overall game ends when a player reaches the threshold first.

categories.label: Round Win Token
categories.description: Gain 1 favor token for each round won.

categories.label: Spy Bonus Token
categories.description: Gain additional favor token when Spy bonus condition is met.
